name: Disable-PSBreakpoint

options.name: -Breakpoint
options.description: Specifies the breakpoints to disable. Enter a variable that contains breakpoint objects or a command that gets breakpoint objects, such as a `Get-PSBreakpoint` command. You can also pipe breakpoint objects to the `Disable-PSBreakpoint` cmdlet.

options.name: -Id
options.description: Disables the breakpoints with the specified breakpoint IDs. Enter the IDs or a variable that contains the IDs. You cannot pipe IDs to `Disable-PSBreakpoint`.

options.name: -PassThru
options.description: Returns an object representing the enabled breakpoints. By default, this cmdlet does not generate any output.

name: -Runspace
-RunspaceId
options.description: Specifies the Id of a Runspace object so you can interact with breakpoints in the specified runspace.

name: -Confirm
-cf
options.description: Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.

name: -WhatIf
-wi
options.description: Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet is not run.

description: Disables the breakpoints in the current console.
